name: rabbit-spec
summary: Owner of the rabbit workflow's spec-lifecycle surface. Hosts the rabbit-spec-creator subagent (drafts AND writes a new feature's initial docs/spec.md, returning a {path_written, summary} handoff) with its input assembler scripts/dispatch-spec-creator.py, and the rabbit-spec-update skill (revises existing specs; absorbed from rabbit-feature/rabbit-feature-spec).
deprecation_criterion: when Claude Code exposes native spec-lifecycle skills that supersede this feature
spec_no_change_reason: Spec amended this cycle (bumped 1.18.0 -> 1.19.0, bug #1066): Inv 3 gains clause (f) pinning the assembled prompt to the canonical single-`.rabbit` runtime root via rabbit-cage's rabbit_runtime_root resolver (Inv 52, #1046), fixing the vendored-mode `.rabbit/.rabbit/prompts/` doubling caused by build-prompt.py's unconditional `<repo_root>/.rabbit/prompts` join when RABBIT_ROOT is already `<host>/.rabbit`. Clause (d)'s stdlib list extended with shutil + importlib.util. Added enforcing tests test-dispatch-prompt-path-no-double-rabbit.py and test-dispatch-prompt-path-standalone.py. Numbering stays contiguous 1..8.
